MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'BRIEN KIERNAN INVESTMENT COMPANY, INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-26-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 06 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-03-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, ELENA VARELA - REPORTER: C/C FOR SETT. CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED. STIPULATED JUDGEMENT SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOCKLER, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 691 O'FARRELL ST, #409, STAYED UNTIL SEP-06-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE PREMISES BY 9/6/97, 5PM JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $750.00. (SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS)
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
